features.name: conditional $dumpfile with dpi filename and subsequent $dumpvars
features.description: Code should include $dumpvars called after $dumpfile where both are inside a conditional block and $dumpfile uses a DPI-C function return value as its argument

features.name: $dumpvars without preceding $dumpfile warning
features.description: Code should include $dumpvars called without a preceding $dumpfile call to trigger the warning message
